title: Conversational interaction does not ensure triage-disposition alignment in ChatGPT Health: analysis code and data
description: Analysis code, source dataset, results workbook, and publication figures for an evaluation of ChatGPT Health on 255 clinical triage cases against nurse-triage and clinician-adjudicated reference standards. Software is released under the MIT License; the data and figures are released under CC BY 4.0 (see LICENSE-data).
